{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sixth Division
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Sixth Division]] is a division [[Lindon]] intends to join.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
